title: Cyrillian

'''Cyrillians''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of tall, [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptiles]] native to the industrialized [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cyrillia/Legends|Cyrillia]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. The species invented the [[DUM-series pit droid/Legends|DUM-series pit droid]] to aid them in vehicle maintenance and made use of it during the reign of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], when their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] became part of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] circuit of [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]].

The species agreed to give up the rights to the model and produce it for the [[Serv-O-Droid, Inc.]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-manufacturing company, in return for profits after Cyrillia ceased to be part of the podracing circuit. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Cyrillia became a [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress world]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], but the Imperials abandoned it in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Cyrillians were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] who stood as tall as [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]],<ref name="NEGTD" /> a species whose [[Gender/Legends|males]] stood around 2.1 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall on average.<ref name="NEGTAS">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref>

==History==
===Exploration and Pius Dea===
Cyrillians were native to [[Cyrillia/Legends|Cyrillia]], an industrialized [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="NEGTD" /> in the [[Cyrillia system/Legends|Cyrillia system]] of the [[Cyrillian Protectorate/Legends|Cyrillian Protectorate]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> The area of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] within which the species' [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] fell was widely explored between [[20,000 BBY/Legends|20,000 BBY]] and [[15,000 BBY/Legends|15,000 BBY]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> During the [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]], the planet became a stronghold of the fanatical religious cult known as the [[Pius Dea]], who at the [[Time/Legends|time]] controlled the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> 

In around [[12,700 BBY]], during the conflicts and by which time the world was within Republic [[Realspace/Legends|space]], a [[Resistance on Cyrillia|resistance]] rose up on Cyrillia, and in [[10,967 BBY]], the Cyrillian homeworld was [[Battle of Cyrillia|attacked]] by [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]] forces and their allies as part of the [[Seventh Alsakan Conflict]], which aimed to remove the cult from power in the Republic.<ref name="EGTW" />

===Pit droid origins===
[[File:DUMpitdreoid-NEGTD.png|thumb|right|upright|300px|alt=A pit droid holding a spanner and a small device stands beside a second pit droid folded up on the ground.|The Cyrillians developed the DUM-series pit droid model, but eventually sold the rights to Serv-O-Droid, Inc.]]
The Cyrillians began making use of turbine-powered, [[Cyrillian transport|floating transports]] on their homeworld prior to [[189 BBY]], and they developed the small [[DUM-series pit droid/Legends|DUM-series pit droid]] model to help carry out maintenance on the vehicles. The [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were used in particular for jobs requiring small size, such as moving under a hovering vehicle or climbing into a circuitry bay. Cyrillia became a part of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] circuit in 189 BBY, and the inhabitants made use of large numbers of pit droids to service and [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] [[Podracer/Legends|podracers]] taking part in the competitions.<ref name="NEGTD" />

In [[122 BBY]], Cyrillia ceased to be part of the podracing circuit, but the pit droids had become so popular that the large droid-manufacturing company, [[Serv-O-Droid, Inc.]], made a deal with the Cyrillians to distribute the model<ref name="NEGTD" /> and purchased the rights to the design.<ref name="RPG">''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]''</ref>. The Cyrillians gave up ownership but agreed to continue making it; in return, the company financed the building of [[Factory/Legends|factories]] on Cyrillia and handled distribution and advertising, with the Cyrillians also still receiving some profit.<ref name="NEGTD" /> Thousands of Cyrillians found jobs building their own model of droid with a Serv-O-Droid nametag in the several modern factories the company built.<ref name="RPG" />

===Hutts and the New Republic===
By [[52 BBY/Legends|52 BBY]], the region of space including Cyrillia had become part of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], an area controlled by members of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] species. It remained in the region until at least [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="TEA" /> when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the successor state to the Republic, claimed the area.<ref name="EGTW" /> By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Cyrillians' homeworld was considered an Imperial [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress world]]. However, in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]] the Imperials were forced to abandon the planet after the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] won a victory over the Empire in a [[Battle of Reytha|battle]] on the nearby fortress world of [[Reytha]].<ref name="TEA" />

The New Republic made the Cyrillian homeworld a Republic stronghold by [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], a situation that led to a [[Battle of Cyrillia (Operation Shadow Hand)|battle]] there during [[Operation Shadow Hand]], a bid by the reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to reclaim lost Imperial territory between [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] and [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. The Cyrillia [[Star system/Legends|system]] was [[Attack on the Cyrillia system|attacked]] again during the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of the galaxy between [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] and [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], and by 27 ABY, the Yuuzhan Vong controlled the planet. Nevertheless, the Vong lost control of the Cyrillian homeworld by [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Cyrillians were first mentioned in the entry for the pit droids in the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]'', a rulebook for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' produced by [[Wizards of the Coast]] and released in [[2000]].<ref name="NEGTD" />
